case_title: THOMPSON, JACQUELINE VS BRAUNREITER, EILEEN F. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,819.36 FILED BY THOMPSON, JACQUELINE AS TO DEFENDANT BRAUNREITER, EILEEN F. CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THOMPSON, JACQUELINE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION AMEND COMPLAINT TO SUBSTITUTE CSAA IN PLACE OF EILEEN BRAUNREITR AS DEFT. DEFT BRAUNREITER DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. THIS JUDGMENT APPLIES TO PLTF'S CLAIM IN EXCESS OF THE $1,000 PAYABLE UNDER THE SUBJECT INSURANCE CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
